# Pull Request Description

## Title
Improve roles & personas and add a checklist for adding new personas

## Summary of changes
- Add recommended personas to docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md (UX Designer, Technical Writer, Release Manager, Business Analyst, DevOps/Platform Engineer, Data Analyst)
- Add a lightweight checklist and template at docs/process-templates/personas-addition-checklist.md to standardize how new personas are proposed and added

## Why it matters
These additions close gaps in handoffs, documentation, release coordination, and measurement, improving clarity and accountability across teams. They align with the acceptance criteria listed in issue #4.

## Files changed
- docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md
- docs/process-templates/personas-addition-checklist.md

## Acceptance checklist for reviewers
- [ ] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [ ] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- [ ] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (PM and Project Manager at minimum)
- [ ] New template/checklist added under docs/process-templates/
